description.ko: 생명의 리듬을 미시적으로 탐구한 작품으로, 무중력의 진주빛 공간 속에서 에메랄드빛 세포망을 따라 흐르는 황금빛 생물 발광을 표현했습니다.
description.en: A microscopic exploration of life's rhythm, where golden bioluminescence flows through emerald cellular networks in a weightless, pearlescent void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Protoplasmic Veil.' A complex, breathing membrane of #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D dark forest vascular structures floating in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid. Flowing ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar pulse through semi-permeable cellular walls like liquid electricity. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic pulsation of translucent capillary systems and golden sap exchange. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine movement.
